text: add a "consolidate" GetPromptRequestSchema that helps looking at all aims and finds duplicates or creates connections where aims are related
description: can be executed multiple times. Does not reduce information. Just consolidates and connects aims.

status.comment: Implemented 'consolidate_aims' prompt in packages/mcp/src/prompts.ts. It fetches all aims and provides instructions for merging/linking/pruning. Rebuilt MCP package.
